raw.message: Create your own epic robot builds and dominate!

hook.summary: Immediate high-intensity mech combat with satisfying kill feedback.
hook.visual_action: A heavy mech fires lasers and machine guns at an enemy robot in a snowy environment.

scene_flow: Heavy mech engages an enemy robot with lasers and machine guns in a snowy base.
The enemy is destroyed, triggering a 'KILL' text overlay.
The mech continues firing at a second target until it explodes.
The video ends with a 'JOIN NOW' call to action on a dark background.
audience_proxy: Action-oriented male gamers interested in sci-fi combat and mech customization.
